raw_text: At Blinkit , it is always fast delivery ( but also sometimes taking longer time to deliver )the cost of the items is kinda high and the delivery charge and handling fee is making it even more higher. I kindly request blinkit to reduce the cost of the shopping items and also please don't include unnecessary taxes or fee or charge at the billing , so that we could save more in online shopping .

Several orders in the past with expiry products were delivered. We customers don't pay extra delivery charges for expired products. Refund is a hassle. It's better to switch to other delivery apps. Horrible experience.

quick and easy to operate . one thing I don't understand is that when delivery above 149 rupay is free then why do I have to pay five rupees extra for COD . The total amount for the ordered goods was 260 ,but I paid 265 . I just want to know the reason .

Amazing service really helpful for working people who don't have time to go grocery shopping. But the only problem is that sometimes veggies are not that fresh so please work on this problem otherwise the service is pretty nice

Good, but I just didn't like the handling charges that always come while ordering anything. I think if the order exceeds certain amount there should be charges because of more things. But for some small things I guess handling charges isn't required.

Uninstalling this application today, customer care needs some training or process change. Before connecting to the customer care department, they had the process of sending a prior-issue message and video proof, but again, their agent was asking multiple questions and wanted to have a call to understand the issue. This kind of app has become successful because of lazy people like me, but I decided to change myself. I will go to the shop and purchase whatever I want.

if blinkit really concern about customer experience. Try to improve your app interface bcz when we all required are ready in cart and before the checkout for payment it is mandatory for price description for checkout value. every time when I go for payment process it takes extra 8rs/- other than the products price without any proper product description

Very disappointed with the service from Blinkit. Even after sharing clear photos and explaining the issue properly, I did not receive a proper response or resolution. A product without clearly visible expiry/best-before details is a serious concern, but the support handling was careless and unhelpful. This has been one of the worst customer support experiences.

Worst experience with Blinkit. They instantly accepted my order and charged my credit card, but later canceled it saying the item was out of stock. If the product wasn't available, why was the order accepted in the first place? Payment gets deducted immediately, but refund takes 4-7 days for a mistake from Blinkit's side. Customers should not have to wait for their own money because of poor inventory management. Very disappointing service

What a horrible app! I emailed the customer service asking them to update the mobile number associated with my blinkit account since i no longer have access to the old contact number. They simply refused and suggested me to create an alternate account. What is so difficult in updating the number in ur database? Pathetic customer service!
Received completely damaged items, reported the issue along with images. The reply from their side was, "we can't verify the issue, hence no resolution will be passed".

This has to be one of the worst apps I’ve ever used. Blinkit has practically zero customer support — the “Need Help” feature barely works, and there’s no real way to get issues resolved. I lost ₹200 because of an order that wasn’t even placed properly on their end. When I raised a complaint, they casually said the refund would come in 3–5 days. After that? They just turned around and claimed the order was “processed” and refused to take responsibility. This company is doomed to fail.

Worst app I've used ever I ordered a blender but got a defective one and they are not even exchanging it return is not allowed and the support team is worst not at all helpful they are least interested they didn't addressed my issue and were all time saying sorry and denied to take the product back now I have to bear with this defective piece.. the app is total fraud be aware guyss don't buy anything

It was my 1st order on blinkit and I hated it. After the payment it said payment failed after which I placed the same order again. Now it started showing that both orders are being delivered. I don't understand what kind of a scam they're trying to do and if I'll even get a refund. In that order a received a torn packet of the bun too. So awful experience. Will not use blinkit service ever again.

the products are good evrything is best of this aap but the price is high I think because like when I opened my account when was new there was only 100 rupee cart then they upgrade to 150 and now it is 200 I think it is little bit expensive that u just want a product for the price 150 or 170 but it is showing 200 or 230 because or the charges and then you have to buy unnecessary things from it. it is the main drawback I experience

do not use this app as there is no guarantee that you will get fresh items. Many times you will receive expired products also. When asked for a refund they will provide you with a coupon. Rather is no option for the amount transfer to the account.

Very poor experience with Blinkit. This was my first order, and I received a defective AUX cable that didn't work on any device. Customer support kept asking for videos, and even after I submitted them, there was no proper resolution. Extremely disappointing service and a frustrating return process. Customers spend their hard-earned money and deserve better support when faulty products are delivered. Overall, a very bad experience. 👎👎👎

Absolutely love the speed and convenience. Getting my daily groceries and household items delivered in just 10 minutes is a lifesaver. The app is incredibly easy to use, and they always have great deals. Highly recommended for quick deliveries

most of the time items not received, for which amount allready paid,, delivery not good sometime they handed over open items, which missing in n quantity, icecream also melted and it delivered to customer... if we want to solve query then help deat not supported in this.. disquisting platform

you guys are playing an amazing game, The customer can only put one review at a time. once again the amazing concept of delivering household items with frozen items (ice creams) let me check in consumer court if e-commerce team is allowed to deliver such items with hygiene and safety and most importantly not letting customers experience their terrifying experience with items
